message:
fix(journal): update adversarial test + harden proptests after zero-sentinel removal

Update adversarial_descriptor_with_zero_tags test to match corrected
parse_descriptor_tags behavior: all-zero tags area produces 62 tags
(no LAST flag), causing truncated transaction rather than empty tags.

Harden proptest_jbd2_write_replay_roundtrip and proptest_jbd2_revoke_skips_writes
to use target blocks at offset 500+ (outside journal region), preventing
collisions between write targets and journal metadata blocks.

Closes bd-1v4e.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
